name: Iso11783FSSeekFile
title: Iso11783FSSeekFile
syntax: long Iso11783FSSeekFile( dword fileHandle, dword mode, dword offset );
description: This function moves the current write/read position of an open file or the read position of directory entries within a directory.

parameters.name: fileHandle
parameters.description: File or directory handle, see also Iso11783FSOpenFile

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: 0: from the beginning of the file / from the first directory entry 1: from the current pointer position 2: from the end of the file / from the last directory entry

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of bytes to move the file pointer or the number of directory entries to move the directory pointer

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
